user_query: I am planning a family vacation in Austria and I want to ensure I have access to my bank account during the trip. Can you provide me with a list of supported banks in Austria and the required login form fields? Additionally, it would be helpful to retrieve the categories for transactions to keep track of our expenses.

TaskList.description: Retrieve a list of supported banks in Austria.
Get the required login form fields for accessing bank accounts for the obtained banks.
Fetch transaction categories to help keep track of expenses during the trip.
